name: Dynavap CCD Screens (3-PACK)
summary: These Dynavap CCD screens (3-PACK) are expertly crafted for precision and filtration.
description: These Dynavap CCD screens (3-PACK) are expertly crafted for precision and filtration. They efficiently filter small particles without hindering airflow. Both stainless steel and titanium are compatible with all Dynavap and Dynavap tips. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
